text:
=D0=CF=CE=C5=C4=A6=CC=CF=CB 26 =CC=C9=D3=D4=CF=D0=C1=C4 2007 09:24 =D0=CF, =
Aryeh M. Friedman =F7=C9 =CE=C1=D0=C9=D3=C1=CC=C9:
> Since I couldn't make heads or tails out your method of setting CFLAGS
> can you send me a patch to turn on all warnings but leave -Werror off
> and I will happily send you a complete compile log.

No patches are neccessary. Just use:

 env NO_WERROR=3Dyes make

Yours,

 -mi
